query:
INSERT INTO categories (name, description) 
SELECT DISTINCT category, CONCAT('Auto-migrated from existing stocks') 
FROM stocks 
WHERE category IS NOT NULL AND category != '' 
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = name
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute INSERT INTO categories (name, description)

FROM stocks
